description: TruePoint Calibration Labs, LLC (Charlotte, NC) is an ISO/IEC 17025:2017 accredited calibration laboratory (A2LA Certificate #4521). Calibration Technician Marcus Okafor has completed calibration of 4 instruments for client Southeastern Chemical Processing, Inc. and needs to create the formal calibration certificate package. Using the data from /home/ga/Documents/calibration_data.json, create a professional calibration certificate package in Apache OpenOffice Writer for the following instruments: Fluke 87V Digital Multimeter (S/N: 27340089), Omega HH42A Thermocouple Thermometer (S/N: TC-88712), Ashcroft 2089 Pressure Gauge (S/N: PG-445601), and Mettler Toledo ML3002E Precision Balance (S/N: B912004567). The document must include a cover page (Lab name, accreditation #, client name, and package # SCP-2024-0147) and four individual certificates. Each certificate must contain instrument identification, calibration/due dates, environmental conditions, measurement data tables (nominal/as-found/as-left/tolerances/pass-fail), reference standard traceability, and uncertainty statements. Apply Heading 1 style for the cover and certificate titles (minimum 5) and Heading 2 style for subsections (minimum 8). Ensure all 4 instrument serial numbers and numerical readings from the JSON are included in the document. Save the final document as /home/ga/Documents/CalCert_Package_SCP_2024_0147.odt.
